list.name: Changes
list.comment: feat(resource): improve event subscription handling and define unsubscribe function type

task.summary:
initial commit
- move src components to ui - delete public directory (for embedding in electron) - change react outDir in vite.config.ts(solve react and electron conflict) - add dist-react to gitignore

initial commit
- move src components to ui - delete public directory (for embedding in electron) - change react outDir in vite.config.ts(solve react and electron conflict) and add base path to relative(prevent build file taking assets from absolute paths) - add dist-react to gitignore - add main.js - exclude src/electron from vite via tsconfig.json - add tsconfig.json in electron directory(to electron-specific compile-build, outDir commands) - add transpile:electron to package.json (to compile all typescript files inside electron directroy)

feature(dev): hot build and reload for electron
- add cross-env, electron-builder, npm-run-all npm packages - add transpile and dist cmds for both macOS and windows - change main entry point again to dist-electron -update run dev command -add util.ts to detect environment - configure strict port: 5123 in vite.config.ts and main.ts for dev and other env.s - add electron-builder.json to configure build info(windows build won't run without an icon) - add dist-electron directory to gitignore

feat(build): configure build with dev and production
- add preload.cts - configure separate root paths for preload.cjs with pathResolver.ts

feat(resource): implement resource polling and static data retrieval
- add resourceManager.ts - add os-utils, os-utils@types npm packages - fix main.ts with getPreloadPath

feat(resource): enhance resource management and data retrieval
- implement polling for CPU and RAM usage - add static data retrieval for storage and CPU model - update preload script to handle statistics subscription - modify main process to send resource statistics to renderer

feat(resource): define global types and update preload, ui method types
- implement static data retrieval for storage and CPU model - enhance IPC communication for statistics subscription - adjust TypeScript configuration for global types

feat(resource): enhance resource management and IPC communication
- implement static data retrieval for storage and CPU model - adjust TypeScript configuration for global types - add type-safe IPC handling

feat(resource): enhance IPC handling and static data retrieval
- refactor IPC methods for type safety - update preload script to improve statistics subscription - adjust TypeScript configuration for global types
feat(resource): implement UI path retrieval and event frame validation
feat(resource): improve event subscription handling and define unsubscribe function type

MESSAGE.value:
initial commit
- move src components to ui - delete public directory (for embedding in electron) - change react outDir in vite.config.ts(solve react and electron conflict) - add dist-react to gitignore

initial commit
- move src components to ui - delete public directory (for embedding in electron) - change react outDir in vite.config.ts(solve react and electron conflict) and add base path to relative(prevent build file taking assets from absolute paths) - add dist-react to gitignore - add main.js - exclude src/electron from vite via tsconfig.json - add tsconfig.json in electron directory(to electron-specific compile-build, outDir commands) - add transpile:electron to package.json (to compile all typescript files inside electron directroy)

feature(dev): hot build and reload for electron
- add cross-env, electron-builder, npm-run-all npm packages - add transpile and dist cmds for both macOS and windows - change main entry point again to dist-electron -update run dev command -add util.ts to detect environment - configure strict port: 5123 in vite.config.ts and main.ts for dev and other env.s - add electron-builder.json to configure build info(windows build won't run without an icon) - add dist-electron directory to gitignore

feat(build): configure build with dev and production
- add preload.cts - configure separate root paths for preload.cjs with pathResolver.ts

feat(resource): implement resource polling and static data retrieval
- add resourceManager.ts - add os-utils, os-utils@types npm packages - fix main.ts with getPreloadPath

feat(resource): enhance resource management and data retrieval
- implement polling for CPU and RAM usage - add static data retrieval for storage and CPU model - update preload script to handle statistics subscription - modify main process to send resource statistics to renderer

feat(resource): define global types and update preload, ui method types
- implement static data retrieval for storage and CPU model - enhance IPC communication for statistics subscription - adjust TypeScript configuration for global types

feat(resource): enhance resource management and IPC communication
- implement static data retrieval for storage and CPU model - adjust TypeScript configuration for global types - add type-safe IPC handling

feat(resource): enhance IPC handling and static data retrieval
- refactor IPC methods for type safety - update preload script to improve statistics subscription - adjust TypeScript configuration for global types
feat(resource): implement UI path retrieval and event frame validation
feat(resource): improve event subscription handling and define unsubscribe function type

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: feat(resource): improve event subscription handling and define unsubscribe function type
